NCT02047981.name: MORDOR-I
NCT02047981.group: CLUSTER-RCT (1533 communities) in Niger / Malawi / Tanzania, biannual single-dose azithromycin vs placebo in children 1-59 months; 2-year follow-up; primary all-cause under-5 mortality. publishedHR=0.86 is the trial-published incidence rate ratio cluster-randomization-corrected (Keenan 2018 NEJM); engine pools via HR path. The tE=3000/cE=3500 counts are illustrative population-aggregate deaths over 2y, NOT patient-level binary events.

allOutcomes.title: All-cause under-5 mortality at 2 years (primary, IRR pooled across countries)

NCT02047981.snippet: Source: Keenan JD et al. NEJM 2018;378:1583-1592 (MORDOR-I biannual azithromycin MDA).

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 1 Month; max age 60 Months; healthy volunteers: t. NCT02048007.name: MORDOR-II
NCT02048007.group: CLUSTER-RCT continuation in Niger only, MORDOR-I placebo communities crossed over to azithromycin; 2-year extension; primary all-cause under-5 mortality. publishedHR=0.87 is cluster-corrected per Keenan 2020 Lancet GH; engine pools via HR path. tE/cE = aggregate deaths, NOT patient-level binary events.

allOutcomes.title: All-cause under-5 mortality at year 4 vs continued placebo control (IRR)

NCT02048007.snippet: Source: Keenan JD et al. Lancet Glob Health 2020 (MORDOR-II Niger extension).

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 1 Month; healthy volunteers: t. NCT04224987.name: AVENIR
NCT04224987.group: CLUSTER-RCT in Niger; biannual azithromycin restricted to infants 1-11 months vs control; 2-year follow-up; primary all-cause infant mortality (1-11 mo subgroup, where MDA effect strongest). publishedHR=0.86 is cluster-corrected per O'Brien 2024 NEJM; engine pools via HR path. tE/cE = aggregate deaths, NOT patient-level binary events.

allOutcomes.title: All-cause mortality 1-11 months at 2 years (primary subgroup, IRR)

NCT04224987.snippet: Source: O'Brien KS et al. NEJM 2024;390:2249-2260 (AVENIR Niger biannual azithromycin in infants).

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 1 Month; max age 59 Months; healthy volunteers: t. CRITERIA: "1. title: RapidMeta Infectious Disease | Mass Azithromycin for Under-5 Mortality in Sub-Saharan Africa v1.0
